member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.FinSkin.Api.SkinController
member.summary: REST endpoints for FinSkin skin management.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.FinSkin.Api.SkinController.SkinsDir
member.summary: Directory where skin CSS files are stored.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.FinSkin.Api.SkinController.GetSkins
member.summary: Returns a list of all available skins.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.FinSkin.Api.SkinController.Upload(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Uploads a new skin CSS file.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.FinSkin.Api.SkinController.Activate(System.String)
member.summary: Activates a skin by updating Jellyfin's Custom CSS setting.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.FinSkin.Api.SkinController.GetSkinCss(System.String)
member.summary: Serves a skin's CSS file — anonymous so browsers can load it.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.FinSkin.Api.SkinInfo
member.summary: Skin metadata returned by the API.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.FinSkin.Api.SkinMeta
member.summary: Optional per-skin metadata from a .json sidecar file.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.FinSkin.Plugin
member.summary: FinSkin — community skin manager plugin for Jellyfin.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.FinSkin.PluginConfiguration.ActiveSkin
member.summary: File name (without extension) of the currently active skin. Empty = no skin.
